from collections import defaultdict
import bisect

class Solution:
    def countServers(self, n: int, logs: List[List[int]], x: int, queries: List[int]) -> List[int]:
        # Sort logs by time
        logs.sort(key=lambda log: log[1])
        # Group server_ids by their times
        time_to_servers = defaultdict(list)
        for server_id, time in logs:
            time_to_servers[time].append(server_id)
        
        # Sort the times for binary search
        sorted_times = sorted(time_to_servers.keys())
        result = []
        
        for q in queries:
            start = q - x
            end = q
            # Find the range of times in [start, end]
            left = bisect.bisect_left(sorted_times, start)
            right = bisect.bisect_right(sorted_times, end)
            
            # Count servers that received requests in this interval
            active_servers = set()
            for i in range(left, right):
                active_servers.update(time_to_servers[sorted_times[i]])
            
            # Total servers that did not receive any requests
            result.append(n - len(active_servers))
        
        return result
